name: Permission Broker
description: Hierarchical permission enforcement for the ai_final multi-agent system. Restricts worker capabilities, enforces least-privilege, and provides runtime elevation request/approval workflow.

permissionsFile.description: Path to the permissions.json file (default: auto-detected from plugin dir)

auditLogEnabled.description: Enable audit logging of all permission decisions

maxGrantDurationMinutes.description: Maximum duration for temporary permission grants
